I coded the moving saws to be able to effortlessly make a path just using some numbers
so I just made those spinning saws to follow a diamond shaped path
well octagon I guess
I could use paths but those are a lot more limiting
it's mildly complicated I guess if you care to hear
you set ds_lists in the creation code, one for x and one for y, it reads the first entry of both x and y at the same time, and you set the amount of blocks you want to move it, not the final position
so 1, -1 on x, and 0, 0 on y would make it move 32px right then 32px left and then loop
supports any arbitrary path using just creation code
also supports stopping the movement
and changing speeds
I didn't end up doing that much with it
but it was fun to code at least
level 17 is the most obvious example
that's entirely done with just a ds_list in creation code
about 2.5 to 3 minutes
